title: Record tighter 32k tool budgets and MCP status pulse

# Tool32k MCP Pulse Contract

## Tool budget 32k
live tool outputs persist earlier at 32k chars to protect long-session context headroom

## Preview 1k
oversize tool previews keep 1k chars so transcripts stay glanceable

## MCP pulse
MCP status pending/failed/needs-auth labels pulse under ambient effects for live transparency

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + tool budget/mcp-status-panel vitest
